title: Technology Company Liquid Sun Launches eSAF Production Pilot â€“ With ABB, Finnair, Fortum, and Finavia
content: Finnish company Liquid Sun is launching a globally unique pilot project to produce renewable, sustainable aviation fuel (eSAF) from biogenic COâ‚‚ emissions. Originating from research at Tampere University, Liquid Sun has developed an innovation based on low-temperature electrolysis (LTE) technology that converts COâ‚‚ emissions and renewable hydrogen into eSAF. For this pilot, Liquid Sun has partnered with Finnair, ABB, Fortum, and Finavia. In Finland, biogenic COâ‚‚ emissions are generated, for example, by the forest industry and biogas plants.
author: Analysts Account
